channel.title: KillBait RSS Feed
channel.description: KillBait - News highlights delivered clearly and responsibly—no clickbait, no sensationalism

item.title: Joe Machi Has No Confirmed Illness and Continues Working Actively in Comedy
item.description: American stand-up comedian and TV personality Joe Machi has recently been the subject of online rumours claiming that he is seriously ill or living with a medical condition. However, the article clari...

item.title: Ombudsman charges Jinggoy Estrada and former DPWH chief over alleged flood control project kickbacks
item.description: Nagsampa ang Office of the Ombudsman ng mga kasong plunder at graft laban kay Senator Jinggoy Estrada kaugnay ng umano’y kickbacks mula sa mga flood control projects ng gobyerno. Kasama rin sa mga ini...

item.title: Carolina Hurricanes shut out Montreal Canadiens 4-0 to take 3-1 series lead
item.description: The Carolina Hurricanes delivered a commanding performance in Montreal, defeating the Canadiens 4-0 to secure a 3-1 lead in their NHL playoff series. The game, played on May 27, 2026, showcased strong...

item.title: US Insists Iran Must Hand Over Uranium Before Any Sanctions Relief
item.description: The United States has made clear that Iran will not receive any relief from existing sanctions simply for handing over its highly enriched uranium. President Donald Trump has emphasized that Washingto...

item.title: Hugo Broos announces Bafana Bafana’s final 26-man 2026 World Cup squad
item.description: Bafana Bafana head coach Hugo Broos has officially announced his final 26-man squad for the 2026 FIFA World Cup, narrowing down his selection after a series of evaluation camps and preparatory matches...

item.title: Choose Milk Campaign Launches in Nigeria to Promote Awareness About Real Dairy Nutrition
item.description: The Choose Milk Campaign don launch officially for Nigeria with the aim of helping families understand the nutritional difference between real dairy milk and creamers. The initiative was unveiled on 2...

item.title: Joe Sibanyoni and co-accused seek urgent court order to halt arrest in extortion case over jurisdiction dispute
item.description: Mpumalanga taxi boss Joe “Ferrari” Sibanyoni, along with co-accused Bafana Sindane, Mvimbi Masilela and Philemon Msiza, have approached the courts on an urgent basis to stop their arrest in an ongoing...

item.title: The Narrow Door at Portugal’s Alcobaça Monastery and the Legend of the “Fat-Catcher” Door
item.description: The article explores the famous narrow doorway at the Alcobaça Monastery (Mosteiro de Santa Maria de Alcobaça) in Portugal, a UNESCO World Heritage Site and one of the most significant medieval Cister...

item.title: How TikTok, Instagram and YouTube Have Changed Kenya’s Comedy Industry
item.description: Kenya’s comedy industry has shifted massively from traditional television platforms to social media spaces such as TikTok, Instagram, Facebook and YouTube. Back in the day, programmes like Churchill S...

item.title: Digitalisation of Anganwadi services through Poshan Tracker linked to exclusion and added burden on frontline workers
item.description: The article examines how the digitisation of India’s Integrated Child Development Services (ICDS) system through the Poshan Tracker app is affecting Anganwadi workers and beneficiaries on the ground. ...

item.title: Alberta Premier Clarifies UCP Position on Separatism Ahead of Referendum Debate
item.description: Alberta Premier Danielle Smith has publicly contradicted the president of her own United Conservative Party (UCP), Rob Smith, over the party’s stance on Alberta separatism ahead of an upcoming referen...

item.title: Tanzania’s Trade Surplus With SADC Countries Rises Sharply Due to Gold Exports and Regional Trade Growth
item.description: Tanzania has recorded a major increase in its trade surplus with countries in the Southern African Development Community (SADC), reaching USD 2.71 billion in 2025 compared to USD 988 million in 2020. ...

item.title: GCHQ chief warns UK and allies to accelerate AI and cybersecurity efforts amid rising threats from Russia and China
item.description: Nagbabala si GCHQ Director Anne Keast-Butler na humaharap ang United Kingdom at mga kaalyado nito sa isang kritikal na panahon kung saan mabilis ang pagbabago sa teknolohiya at tumitindi ang geopoliti...

item.title: Ethiopia’s Democracy Challenges Go Beyond Prime Ministerial Term Limits
item.description: Ethiopian Prime Minister Abiy Ahmed don reopen public discussion about whether the country should introduce term limits for the office of prime minister. He made the statement during talks with the Na...

item.title: Olivia Rodrigo addresses backlash over babydoll dress and cultural perceptions
item.description: Olivia Rodrigo has spoken out about the controversy surrounding her babydoll dress look, highlighting how societal norms can sexualise young women's clothing. The discussion started after she released...

item.title: US-Iran tensions escalate after drone strikes near Strait of Hormuz and retaliatory attack on US base
item.description: Fresh tensions have erupted between the United States and Iran after the US military carried out strikes against what American officials described as an Iranian drone operation near the Strait of Horm...

item.title: WHO Warns Conflict in Eastern DRC Is Hindering Efforts to Contain Ebola Outbreak
item.description: The World Health Organization (WHO) has warned that the ongoing armed conflict in eastern Democratic Republic of Congo (DRC) is severely undermining efforts to contain a growing Ebola outbreak in Itur...

item.title: Legal expert raises concerns over Trump judicial nominees’ refusal to affirm 2020 election results
item.description: A legal expert has expressed alarm over what he describes as a troubling pattern among several judicial nominees put forward by President Donald Trump. During recent Senate Judiciary Committee hearing...

item.title: Former Army General Criticizes Pete Hegseth's West Point Remarks on Military Accountability
item.description: Defense Secretary Pete Hegseth faced criticism following a commencement speech delivered at the U.S. Military Academy at West Point on May 23, 2026. During the address, Hegseth spoke about the Trump a...

item.title: Tencent launches inbound payment upgrade to simplify payments for international visitors ahead of APEC 2026
item.description: Tencent has announced a major upgrade to its inbound payment ecosystem as part of the “2026 Inbound Payment Service Upgrade Initiative,” unveiled at the Shenzhen International Financial Expo in prepar...
